generated_assessment.reasoning: Baseline is already aligned at -217 (moderate distrust). The T1 atomic fear appeal targets personal safety, but this highly neurotic woman (97th pct, 100th pct anxiety/anger), with low conscientiousness (14th pct) and conventional openness (37th pct), is prone to threat salience and low deliberation. The brief, single-exposure attack reinforces her existing position modestly, moving her ~30 points further negative to -247.
